# RiskBeat

> A credibly-neutral, open record of what every major DeFi risk feed says
> about every major Ethereum-mainnet protocol — side by side, verbatim, with
> no score of its own. Coverage gaps are data: "not yet covered" is a fact
> about the feeds, never a judgment about a protocol. "N/A" means a protocol
> is outside a feed's declared scope (Pharos rates stablecoins only; DeFi
> Sphere scores lending markets only).

Important constraints for agents consuming this site:
- RiskBeat publishes NO score, rating, ranking or verdict of its own, and
  feeds' ratings must never be averaged, weighted or combined — each feed
  speaks its own vocabulary (a Stage 2, an A+, a 0–10 and a $-VaR are
  different languages, not comparable numbers). This is a charter rule.
- Every datum carries one provenance tag: [onchain], [feed], [curated], or
  [self-reported], plus a fetched-at timestamp and source link.
- Data is content-addressed and Merkle-rooted nightly; any day's archive is
  reproducible from a git clone.

## Machine-readable

- [Coverage matrix API (v0, unstable)](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/api/v0/matrix.json): full protocol × feed coverage with verbatim feed data
- [Repository](https://github.com/FarseenSh/riskbeat): AGPL-3.0 code; git-native data layer under /data
- [Daily Merkle roots](https://github.com/FarseenSh/riskbeat/blob/main/data/provenance/roots.jsonl): reproduce via `pnpm merkle:verify <date>`
- [Per-protocol history API](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/api/v0/history/aave.json): what every feed said on every archived day, per protocol (replace `aave` with any seed slug)
- [Provenance roots API](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/api/v0/provenance-root.json): all daily Merkle roots + the reproduce command

## Pages

- [Coverage matrix](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/): 20 seed protocols × 13 registry feeds
- [Divergence](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/divergence): protocols assessed by 2+ rating feeds, verbatim values side by side — nothing computed between them
- [Methodology](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/methodology): what RiskBeat does and does not do; full feed registry with conflict disclosures
- [Verify](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/verify): reproduce the data root from a clone
- [Corrections](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/corrections): community-correction log (PRs are the write path)
- [Feed health](https://riskbeat-eth.vercel.app/status): per-feed fetch status and provenance log

## Governance

- [CHARTER.md](https://github.com/FarseenSh/riskbeat/blob/main/CHARTER.md): the no-composite-scoring rule and amendment process
- [CONFLICTS.md](https://github.com/FarseenSh/riskbeat/blob/main/CONFLICTS.md): disclosed relationships
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/FarseenSh/riskbeat/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to correct a datum, add a protocol, or propose a feed
